required_questions: Did we trade well today (process + execution), independent of lucky PnL?
Did the system behave correctly (no dupes, kill switch reachable, logs complete)?
Was PnL good, bad, or misleading (fees/slippage/luck vs setup quality)?
Which setup type performed best on post-fee expectancy?
Which setup type should be reduced or shadowed?
Ahead or behind validation goals for this calendar day?
Tomorrow: same size, lower, or slightly higher — per scaling gates only?
Single highest-value improvement for execution or risk guard tomorrow?
